name: Testing v1.4.6

dark.customCSS: * { border-radius: 0px !important; font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace !important; } ::selection { background: #000000; color: #FFFF00; } input, textarea { border: 2px solid #000000 !important; background-color: #FFFFFF !important; color: #000000 !important; } button { border: 2px solid #000000 !important; box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px #000000 !important; }
